problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
